summary: Batch decomp PR that matched six functions and improved twelve more partials across camera, fighter, game mode/results/opening, interface text/stock, stage, menu, and trophy/toy code. The verified GALE01 report credited +2216 matched bytes and raised matched code by +0.06%, with new 100% matches for Camera_80030E44, ftAction_80073008, fn_8017A9B4, un_80318B1C, ftNn_Init_80123954, and gm_801A9DD0.

key_files.reason: Matched Camera_80030E44 by changing access patterns from a local Camera* to direct cm_80452C68 field references.
Matched ftAction_80073008 by correcting float/local usage, argument order, and explicit cast of color_anim to s32 for ftCo_800DEE84.
Matched ftNn_Init_80123954 with local declarations, branch restructuring, distance-square calculation, and corrected calls for Nana/Popo ground-air transitions.
Matched gm_801A9DD0 by adjusting parameter type, local float temporaries, viewport/scissor layout, and HSD_CObj setup call shapes.
Updated gm_801A9DD0 prototype so arg2 is u16 instead of int, matching the implementation and required-protos verification.
Matched fn_8017A9B4 by introducing a static inline helper around HSD_ImageDesc initialization and lb_800121FC calls.
Matched un_80318B1C by storing pointer-like values through an s32* cast into grid->sort[start].val.
Improved fn_80175A94 from 8.25% to 99.66% through field fixes, temporary variables, and if/else reshaping.
Improved un_80303FD4 from 50.37% to 93.04% with #pragma dont_inline, pointer temporaries, and loop reshaping.
Improved fn_802FA6C4 by changing loop compare form and reverse cleanup iteration.
Improved gmCamera_801A292C by using a struct pointer alias, table pointer alias, gmCamera_801A25C8 helper call, and MIN macro.
Improved ft_800852B0 by deriving adjacent ftData_UnkCountStruct arrays from CostumeListsForeachCharacter with casts/offsets and reworking loop locals.
Improved grInishie2_801FD9EC by changing local ordering, using GET_GROUND reloads, and introducing Vec3* temporaries for JObj translation calls.
Changed un_804D5A8C declaration from unsized char array to char[4], a small header/data typing fix used by toy/trophy code.

what_changed: Added six confirmed 100% matches: Camera_80030E44, ftAction_80073008, fn_8017A9B4, un_80318B1C, ftNn_Init_80123954, and gm_801A9DD0.
Improved twelve unmatched items according to the decomp.dev bot report, including fn_80175A94 to 99.66%, fn_802FA6C4 to 99.13%, un_803147C4 to 99.38%, and grInishie2_801FD9EC to 98.13%.
Updated gm_801A9DD0's header and implementation signature from an int third parameter to u16, matching its viewport/scissor usage.

Reworked several functions primarily through type casts, local-variable lifetimes, pointer aliases, loop-direction changes, inline extraction, and condition restructuring rather than large semantic rewrites.
Verification evidence in the PR body lists python configure.py --require-protos and ninja, and the GALE01 bot report confirms the matching deltas.
smart_moves: Used direct global field references in Camera_80030E44 instead of a local camera pointer, which was enough to remove the final mismatch.
Removed obsolete PAD_STACK/todo scaffolding from ftAction_80073008 after identifying the correct f32 locals and final ftCo_800DEE84 argument types.
Introduced a tiny static inline helper in gmresultplayer.c to force duplicated image descriptor initialization into the expected code shape for fn_8017A9B4.
Used #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around un_80303FD4, containing an inlining-control tactic to the one function being improved.
Replaced hand-written clamp logic in gmCamera_801A292C with MIN(unk->x30, unk->x40), producing a closer match while making intent clearer.
Changed ifStock cleanup to iterate from 129 down to 0, a useful reminder that destruction order can be codegen-relevant.
decomp_lessons: For close matches, local pointer aliases versus direct global references can affect generated code even when behavior is equivalent.
Prototype accuracy matters: changing gm_801A9DD0's dimension argument to u16 in both .c and .h aligned casts, viewport fields, and required-protos checking.
Explicit narrow casts can be match-critical, as shown by efAsync_LoadSync((u8) ftKb_Init_803CB46C[arg0]) and HSD_GObjObject_80390A70(..., new_var = (u8) HSD_GObj_804D784A, ...).
Pointer punning/cast stores may be necessary where struct field typing is still approximate, as in tydisplay.c storing through *(s32*) &grid->sort[start].val.
Loop form matters: i != limit, reverse iteration, pointer-walk loops, and resetting i inside a loop all appeared as tactics for improving partials.
Sometimes better matching requires intentionally awkward temporaries such as new_var, new_var2, or local f32 holders; keep these evidence-grounded until surrounding types are better understood.
When data tables are not yet fully typed, deriving adjacent arrays through byte offsets or casts, as in ft_800852B0, can improve matches but should be revisited when the data layout is understood.
naming_conventions: The PR kept existing address-based placeholder names such as fn_80175A94, un_80303FD4, and gm_801A9DD0 rather than inventing semantic names.

Subsystem prefixes remained consistent: Camera_ for camera, ftAction_/ftKb_/ftNn_ for fighter code, gm/gmCamera for game-mode code, grInishie2 for stage code, if for interface code, mn for menu code, and ty/un for toy/trophy code.
New helper name inline1 is purely mechanical and not semantic; future cleanup should rename only when stronger evidence exists.
Temporary names like new_var, unk, tbl, pairs, and thing were used as matching scaffolding and should not be treated as stable semantic naming evidence.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Direct global access: Camera_80030E44 replaced Camera* camera = &cm_80452C68 with repeated cm_80452C68.field access.
Float/int shaping: ftAction_80073008 changed color_anim to f32, computed dmg_mult as (1 / 256.0f) * charge_rate, and cast color_anim to s32 at the call.
Struct layout casting: gm_801A9DD0 builds a Scissor-shaped viewport and casts it to HSD_RectS16* for HSD_CObjSetViewport.
Inline helper extraction: fn_8017A9B4 moved repeated image initialization into static inline void inline1(HSD_ImageDesc* imgs, int slot, u16* w, u16* h).
No-inline pragma: un_80303FD4 was wrapped with #pragma dont_inline to control codegen.
Loop reshaping: ifStock used i != 130 and a reverse i = 129; i >= 0 loop; textlib used a pointer-walk while loop over x8 entries.
Macro substitution: gmCamera_801A292C used MIN(unk->x30, unk->x40) instead of a temporary compare/assign sequence.
Cast-based data/table access: ft_800852B0 computes ftData_UnkCountStruct* from CostumeListsForeachCharacter[FTKIND_MAX] and byte offset 5940.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report showed matched code increased to 69.96% (+0.06%, +2216 bytes), with six new matches and twelve improvements.
No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename or better type inline1 in gmresultplayer.c.
Search for follow-up typing of un_804D5A8C char[4] and grid->sort[start].val in toy/trophy code.
Look for later cleanup of ft_800852B0 data layout around CostumeListsForeachCharacter, ftData_Table_Unk0, and ftData_UnkIntPairs.
Search for additional matches using #pragma dont_inline in interface/textlib functions.
Check later work on fn_80175A94, which was improved to 99.66% but not fully matched in this PR.
